localized_texts.text: Splash Out Langkawi Water Theme Park Marketplace

Escape from the hustle and bustle of the city, take your loved ones to the much-celebrated Splash Out Langkawi, and spend your weekend cooling down with a range of water activities.Slide down the colors of the Rainbow Rider for thrills and spills, or get drenched at Big Splash Kingdom. Ride the gut-wrenching Perfect Storm to show off your bravery and be amazed by the rough ride that will keep you spinning toward the ground. For something more relaxing, casually float on the River of Life and feel the gentle current carry your stresses away.
Location: The waterpark is located in Kedah Langkawi, around 10 minutes drive from the main ferry terminal.
Attractions: The park features 12 water attractions (River of Life, Big Splash Kingdom, Perfect Storm).
The park is suitable for all ages, with several sections great for younger kids.
Splash Kingdom is a water play area for children 12 years old and below.
Many of the bigger slides and activities have a minimum height requirement of 120cm.

Ditch the city heat and cool down with a fun-filled water adventure at Splash Out Langkawi! Take on the twists and turns of the Rainbow Rider, get drenched at Big Splash Kingdom, or conquer the thrilling Perfect Storm. Feeling relaxed? Float down the calming River of Life. Splash Out Langkawi offers something for everyone - thrills, chills, and a perfect weekend escape!
Food/Drinks: Outside options may be restricted, check park policy.
Lost & Found: Report lost items to staff.
Age Limits: Some items may have age restrictions.
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter

Terms & Conditions: The ticket rate is based on height measurement. Please refer to the following: - Adult ticket is required for heights from 120cm and above - Child is required for height from 90cm to 120cm - FOC for height from 90cm and below Height Verification: If it is found that a customer has purchased a child ticket for a person taller than 120 cm, an extra charge will be applied as follows: - Non MyKAD/International Rate: RM15 - MyKAD Rate: RM12 Senior ticket rates will be based on the age of 60 years and above An extra charge of RM15 (International rate) and RM12 (MyKAD rate) will be charged if it is found that a customer buys a child ticket for those who are over than 120cm. Children aged 0-12 must be accompanied by adult Children with a height of 89cm or below can enter free of charge Seniors aged 61+ must be accompanied by a paying guest and present a valid MyKad or Passport to enjoy the senior citizen rate
Cancellation Policy: Free cancellation till validity ends.
What’s included: Admission to Splash Out Langkawi Water Theme Park

Terms & Conditions: Important Informations : Operations Hour 11 AM - 7 PM The ticket rate is based on height measurement. Please refer to the following: - Adult ticket is required for heights from 120cm and above - Child is required for height from 90cm to 120cm - FOC for height from 90cm and below Height Verification: If it is found that a customer has purchased a child ticket for a person taller than 120 cm, an extra charge will be applied as follows: - Non MyKAD/International Rate: RM15 - MyKAD Rate: RM12 Senior ticket rates will be based on the age of 60 years and above Use of this NON-TRANSFERABLE VOYAGER ANNUAL PASS implies agreement with the terms and conditions of Splash Out Langkawi Annual pass holder must present his/her Pass and ID for admittance to the park. Some attractions or areas may be closed due to weather change, maintenance, special events, private events, or others. Outside Food or Beverages may not be brought onto Splash Out Langkawi premises. Purchase price of passes is non-transferable and non-refundable. The Management is not responsible for lost or stolen pass and receipts cannot be replaced. Pass holder agrees to obey all posted rules and instructions of the Water Park and all verbal instructions of its personnel. The Management reserves the right to revoke the Pass without refund in the event of violations. Children 12 and under must be accompanied by an adult. Please supervise your children. Any unauthorized re-sale of passes, tickets, coupons, or any other benefits associated may cause this Pass to be revoked without refund
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
